mapper.select: SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.chat_room_name AS chatRoomName, cr.chat_room_type AS chatRoomType, cr.status, cr.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT cm2.content FROM chat_message cm2 WHERE cm2.room_id = cr.chat_room_id ORDER BY cm2.created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS lastMessage FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_member cm ON cr.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cr.chat_room_type = 'SUPPORT' ORDER BY cr.chat_room_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_room (chat_room_id, chat_room_type, chat_room_name, status, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, 'SUPPORT', #{roomName}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO chat_member (chat_member_id, chat_room_id, member_id) VALUES (SEQ_CHAT_MEMBER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{chatRoomId}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, chat_room_name AS chatRoomName, chat_room_type AS chatRoomType, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_room WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId}

SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.chat_room_name AS chatRoomName, cr.chat_room_type AS chatRoomType, cr.status, cr.created_at AS createdAt, m2.nickname AS userName, (SELECT cm2.content FROM chat_message cm2 WHERE cm2.room_id = cr.chat_room_id ORDER BY cm2.created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS lastMessage, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm3 WHERE cm3.room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND cm3.member_id != (SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AND cm3.created_at > NVL( (SELECT adm.last_connected_at FROM chat_member adm WHERE adm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND adm.member_id = (SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)), DATE '1900-01-01') ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_room cr JOIN chat_member crm ON cr.chat_room_id = crm.chat_room_id JOIN member1 m1 ON crm.member_id = m1.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE cr.chat_room_type = 'SUPPORT' AND m1.role != 'ROLE_ADMIN' ORDER BY CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm3 WHERE cm3.room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND cm3.member_id != (SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AND cm3.created_at > NVL( (SELECT adm.last_connected_at FROM chat_member adm WHERE adm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND adm.member_id = (SELECT member_id FROM member1 WHERE role = 'ROLE_ADMIN' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY)), DATE '1900-01-01')) > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, cr.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_room SET status = #{status} WHERE chat_room_id = #{roomId}

MERGE INTO chat_member cm USING DUAL ON (cm.chat_room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.member_id = #{adminId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET cm.last_connected_at = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (chat_member_id, chat_room_id, member_id, last_connected_at) VALUES (SEQ_CHAT_MEMBER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{roomId}, #{adminId}, SYSDATE)
UPDATE CHAT_ROOM SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE' WHERE CHAT_ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND STATUS = 'CLOSED'
